calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
Plaintiff:Attorney Peter R. Chernik present in pro per, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Peter R. Chernik and against the defendants: APC Export, Inc, a Nevada Corporation; Richard L. Strahl and Ray L. Smith.
Damages of $26,613.22
Attorney's fees of $2,825.00
Costs $461.90
For the total of $29,900.12.
Judgment signed in open court.
